Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Wiston Gutierrez
Message:
fix(auth): resolve 2FA replay and cookie logout vulnerabilities

- Implemented pessimistic locking (select_for_update) and deletion consuming 2FA challenges.
- Forced cookie clearing on LogoutView and RefreshView even on 401/error states.
- Updated K6 simulation to serve as security audit tool.
- Documented findings in ADDENDUM_SEGURIDAD_v1.1.md.

Description: Detected a Generic API Key, potentially exposing access to various services and sensitive operations.
Author: Wiston Gutierrez
Message:
feat: Implement Backend Bootstrap & Onboarding API

- Add must_change_password to User model
- Implement BootstrapInitView, BootstrapOrgView, PasswordChangeView
- Configure JWTAuthWithOrgContext to exempt bootstrap endpoints
- Update audit contracts for new event types
- Fix MeSerializer to return setup status
- Add test_bootstrap_api.py
